channel.title: Webtop on Stefan Gloutnikov
channel.description: Recent content in Webtop on Stefan Gloutnikov

item.title: Linux Desktop Environment on a Server from Your Browser
item.description: I needed a desktop environment to use a certain application on my small Linux VPS. X11 forwarding over SSH was the first thing that came to mind, but I decided to see what else was out there. I’m glad I did, as it led me to the Webtop project.
